{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "AmerMrkaljevic", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/98971631?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/AmerMrkaljevic", "id": 98971631, "login": "AmerMrkaljevic", "node_id": "U_kgDOBeYv7w", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/AmerMrkaljevic", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-58508", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "Hi Gitea security team,

I found two related SSRF vulnerabilities in Gitea during a source code audit.

Finding 1 — Migration SSRF via DNS rebinding (MEDIUM)
File: services/migrations/migrate.go:85-86

IsMigrateURLAllowed resolves DNS at check time via net.LookupIP. The git subprocess
re-resolves DNS independently. An attacker with DNS control + low TTL can pass the
check with a public IP, then rebind to an internal IP before git fetches.
Classic TOCTOU on DNS resolution.

Finding 2 — Mirror sync URL never re-validated (MEDIUM)
File: services/mirror/mirror_pull.go:120-130

On every sync cycle, git fetch is called with the stored URL without calling
IsMigrateURLAllowed again. Post-setup DNS rebinding enables ongoing SSRF on every
sync interval — persistent internal access.

Version tested: current main branch.
Please let me know when CVEs are assigned.

Regards
", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j72v-mjr6-3424", "html_url": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-j72v-mjr6-3424", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j72v-mjr6-3424"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-58508"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-07-13T17:38:18Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/75789103?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bircni", "id": 75789103, "login": "bircni", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc1Nzg5MTAz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Two SSRF vulnerabilities in Gitea migration/mirror (DNS rebinding + missing re-validation)", "updated_at": "2026-07-13T17:38:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-j72v-mjr6-3424", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "code.gitea.io/gitea"}, "patched_versions": "1.27.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.26.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Two SSRF vulnerabilities in Gitea migration/mirror (DNS rebinding + missing re-validation)
